title: Nguyen Trai Helping the Uprising
summary: Nguyen Trai was a great military strategist and poet who presented the 'Binh Ngo Book' to Le Loi and helped the Lam Son uprising achieve complete victory.

slides.text: Nguyen Trai broke through the enemy's blockade to find the Lam Son insurgents and presented Le Loi with invaluable strategies for fighting the enemy.
slides.imagePrompt: Nguyen Trai meeting Le Loi in a secret forest camp, discussing strategy over a map, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He was the author of 'Binh Ngo Dai Cao', the second declaration of independence that reaffirmed the sovereignty of the Dai Viet nation.
slides.imagePrompt: Nguyen Trai writing with a brush on a long scroll, looking inspired, traditional scholar outfit, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: With the philosophy of 'Using humanity to replace violence', he contributed to winning over the hearts of the people to drive out the Ming army.
slides.imagePrompt: Nguyen Trai talking to captured enemy soldiers, showing mercy and wisdom, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Nguyen Trai is not only a national hero but has also been honored as a World Cultural Celebrity.
slides.imagePrompt: Statue or portrait of Nguyen Trai with a background of books and symbols of culture, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What is the name of the famous declaration of independence written by Nguyen Trai?
Which King did Nguyen Trai help to drive out the Ming army?
